# informativeText()

**Instance Method**

Returns the (optional) informative text currently displayed in the panel.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func informativeText() -> String!
```

## Controlling the Appearance of a Certificate Trust Panel

- **setInformativeText(_:)**: Sets the (optional) informative text displayed in the panel.
